expected_behavior: All applicable MUST_PASS and REGRESSION rows have concrete evidence; human rows are explicit; report metadata binds to verified revision/tree; no production/live overclaim is present.
given: A feature/milestone report claims VS2 completion.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Machine-readable report, command transcript, evidence manifest/hashes, base/final revision metadata, verdict.
then: All applicable MUST_PASS and REGRESSION rows have concrete evidence; human rows are explicit; report metadata binds to verified revision/tree; no production/live overclaim is present.
verification_method: Scenario report schema validation, gate command, report review.
when: The native scenario verifier and gate run against the exact code/tree state.
